generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T <<<<< CINNABARIS. RECTUM AND ANUS. ► Bleeding piles for two days, [10] . ► Feeling of weight in lower part of rectum, and a sensation like aching, after dinner (ninth day), [17b] . ► Violent itching in anus, worse at night, in bed, [10] . STOOL. ► Diarrha. ► Nightly diarrha for two weeks, without colic, [2] . ► Two stools daily, [1] . ► Two easy soft stools every day, preceded by some griping, which is relieved after the stool, [1] . ► Two passages from bowels, in afternoon, the last one with straining, [24] . ► Constipation. ► Constipation, only one passage in a week, [25] . [180.] ► Violent constipation, lasting all the time while taking, and for a long time after, [10] . ► Disposed to costiveness throughout the whole proving, [17b] . ► Stools hard and too large (second day), [7] . URINARY ORGANS. ► Urethra. ► Pain like a soreness in the urethra, while urinating, although it is not painful to pressure, [1] . ► Sensation as if there were a raw spot in centre of urethra, which woke him up two nights in succession, [10] . ► Urgent desire to urinate (after ten minutes), [9] . ► Micturition. ► Increase of urinary discharges, [10] . ► Great increase in flow of urine and saliva, lasting one hour, with shooting pain in left side of head, from occiput to forehead, [22] . ► More profuse discharge of clear urine, [10] . ► Urine. ► Urine tinged yellow (third day), [8] . [190.] ► Urine turbid, [15] . SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Male. ► Redness and swelling of the prepuce; it looks sore, with itching pain, [1] . ► Small red spots on the glans penis, [1] . ► Two small red spots appeared on each side of the glans, secreting a large quantity of lardaceous matter. It had the appearance, according to his opinion, of herpes preputialis, [10] . ► Shining red points on the glans, as if pimples would form, [1] . ► Penis swollen, [1] . ► Jerking in the penis, [1] . ► Violent erections in the evening, [10] . ► Violent erections in the evening, in bed, [1] . ► Tearing stitches in the glans, [1] . [200.] ► Itching pain in the fossa behind the glans penis; pus having a nauseous sweetish odor oozes out, [1] . ► Violent itching of the corona glandis, with a profuse secretion of pus; the itching was so violent as to cause him to rub it, which only ceased it for a short time, to return with tenfold violence, [10] . ► Burning, sticking itching on the corona glandis, in the evening, relieved by rubbing, soon after, returning more violent than ever, [1] . ► Sexual excitement on the least provocation (second day), [20] . ► Sexual excitement, as if about to have an emission, but is able to combat the feeling, at 2.30 P.M. (second day), [20] . ► Increased sexual desire, with erections, which continued at night, terminating by an emission of semen (second day), [16b] . ► After finishing the medicine, all desire for an embrace is lost, which was not the case before the took the medicine, [10] . ► Female. ► *Leucorrha, the discharge of which causes a pressure in the vagina , [1] . RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► Voice. ► Hoarseness of the voice, in the morning, going off in two or three hours, [13] . ► Every evening, hoarseness with crouplike cough, [10] . ► Cough. [210.] ► Cough, [3] . ► (On lying down she is compelled to cough incessantly, relieved by sitting up; single, very dry shocks of cough), [1] . CHEST. ► Front. ► Pain under lower point of sternum, extending to left side under short ribs, [10] . ► Pain running near ensiform cartilage from the seventh rib on right side, diagonally through to the chest, [21] . ► A severe pain extending from the cartilage of the seventh rib at its junction with the sternum, to the right hypochondriac region under the inferior border of the tenth rib, from 4 to 5 P.M. (second day), [16] . ► Sticking in chest, just beneath sternum, [15] . ► Sides. ► Pain in upper part of left and right lung, [10] . ► Pain on seventh rib of each side, in a spot as large as a quarter dollar, more on left side, [10] . ► Occasional pains in left side of chest, between cartilages of fifth and sixth ribs (second day). Returned in evening, in region of heart, of a sharp cutting character, producing difficulty in getting breath, while they continued (third day). Returned in forenoon, followed by wandering pains throughout whole chest (fourth day), [16] . ► Soreness under right breast, near last true rib, particularly on drawing breath, [25] . HEART AND PULSE. ► Præcordium. [220.] ► *An inward soreness over the heart, extending along the left arm on taking a long breath, [10] . ► Heart's Action. ► Nervous trembling of the heart, with anxiety, to which she was formerly subject, again returns, in evening, [24] . ► Pulse. ► Pulse at first rapid, intermitting, strong, afterwards tremulously weak, [3] . ► Pulse, which was at 12 M. from 44 to 52, rose at 4 P.M. to 80, [15] . ► Pulse 60, at noon; 80 in evening (second day), [19] . ► Pulse 60 (second day), [7] . ► Seems to lower the pulse in forenoon and make it irregular, [15] . ► Throbbing-like pulse and sticking here and there near the sternum and beneath the short ribs, mostly when walking, least when sitting and lying, [1] . NECK AND BACK. ► Neck. ► Pain in back part of neck, when head is thrown back, extending to occiput, [10] . ► Pain on right side of neck, below the sterno-cleido-mastoid muscle, on turning head, [10] . [230.] ► The muscles of the back part of neck seem as if contracted, [10] . ► Pain as if dislocated in the cervical vertebræ, [2] . ► Soreness from right ear into the middle of the posterior cervical region, as if the glands were affected (second day). Soreness increased, very severe in evening (third day), [150] . ► Back. ► Tearing pain and a sensation as if everything would separate in the side of the back, especially at night, on the slightest motion in bed, and also in the arm while writing, both relieved by the warmth of the stove, [1] . ► Dorsal. ► General pain all over the back, down to loins, worse after every dose of medicine, aggravated on drawing a long breath, [10] . ► Dull pain in lower dorsal portion of spine, continuing only for a short time (after ten minutes), [9] . ► Sticking pain in region of left side of fifth and sixth dorsal vertebræ, in evening (fifth day). Same pain occasionally on the right side of same vertebræ (sixth day), [17b] . ► Lumbar. ► Aching in small of back, as if bruised, [24] . ► Aching pain in small of back and legs (sixth day), [11] . ► Aching across small of back and in limbs, in morning (third day), [11] . [240.] ► Severe aching and drawing pains in back, from region of kidneys to sacrum, and in thighs and legs, all last night and to-day. Drawing up of legs affords relief. (The pains in legs were exactly like those he suffered years ago from Calomel ), (seventh day), [11] . ► Awaked by a dull sticking pain in region of left kidney, which lasted but a short time, about 4 A.M. Afterwards, tossing about and sleeplessness for an hour (fifth day), [17b] . ► Sharp pain, at night, in region of kidneys, as if a nail had been driven in on each side of the vertebræ, [10] . EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► Paralytic sensation in all the limbs; he is heavy and sleepy, [1] . ► Numbness and heavy aching in arms and knees, and lower legs, at 8 P.M. (second day), [8] . ► Pain in all the joints, with lameness, during the day (second day), [19] . ► Dull aching in bones of forearms and legs (second day), [7] . ► Dull aching pain in bones of forearms and legs (after six hours and three-quarters), [8] . SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► dema of right arm, [26] . ► Pain along left arm, particularly in little finger, third finger, and thumb, [10] . [250.] ► Wakened several times from sleep at night by a severe pain in right arm. It continued next morning and during the day; at times very severe, commencing about the centre of the os humeri, and extending to the elbow and along the radius to its inferior extremity; the pain was of a heavy, aching character, deepseated, and caused lameness and difficulty in moving the arm (fourth day), [16] . ► Severe stitches, at times, in the arm, [1] . ► Shoulder. ► Lame sensation in right shoulder-joint, in evening (second day), [17] . ► Elbow. ► The least twitch causes the elbow-joint and shoulder to crack, [10] . ► Numb feeling in elbows, as if the ulnar nerve was compressed, also numbness in knee-joints, [15] . ► A constant pain in left arm-joint when turning and straightening the arm and when writing, [10] . ► On supinating the forearm, the pain is worse at the elbow; it feels as if the "crazy-bone" were struck, [10] . ► Forearm. ► Numbness of left arm, from elbow down to end of little finger, [8] . ► Numbness in left arm, from elbow to end to little finger, passing off on using the arm, and returning again while at rest (second day), [7] . ► Fingers. ► Pain in right little finger, [10] . [260.] ► Occasional shooting and prickling pain in the two middle fingers of left hand, better by firm pressure upon thumb (after two hours), [12] . ► Sharp darting pains like electric flashes, passing from the first phalanx of ring finger of right hand to middle of forearm, and from lower extremity of radius of left arm up to elbow (after one hour), [16] . INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Lameness and frequent stitches on walking, particularly inner side of knee-joint (second day), [18] . ► Tired feeling in all the joints of lower extremities, better from rising and walking, [20] . ► Drawing in all the muscles of the lower extremities, on the under surface, [10] . ► Hip. ► Pain and tired feeling in right hip, and afterwards in left, [20] . ► Thigh. ► Aching pains in thighs, during day and night (second day), [11] . ► Drawing-aching pains in thighs, from the hip-joints nearly down to the condyles, aggravated by moving, and accompanied with great lameness on getting up and attempting to walk, getting better after walking a short distance, [11] . ► Shooting-aching pain on posterior side of right thigh, from hip-joint to middle of os femoris, on straining at stool (after two hours), [11] . ► Knee. ► Pain in knee-joint, worse at noon, while walking, [10] . [270.] ► Frequent pain in lower side of left knee, near inner side of tibia (second day), [18] . ► Sticking pain in back part of left knee-joint for a short time in forenoon (second day), [17b] . ► A slight sticking pain in right knee-joint, with a creeping sensation above and below it, seemingly about the bone, lasting about an hour, in afternoon (second day), [17b] . ► Leg. ► Painful jerking in the lower leg, in the evening, after going to sleep, awakens him, [1] . ► Pain in tendo Achillis and os calcis after walking, [15] . ► Ankle. ► Sore feeling of the ankle, attended with heat and itching over the whole leg, [10] . ► Foot. ► Pressive sensation in the foot, as if it would go to sleep, [1] . ► Toes. ► (Rheumatic pain in the great toe), [1] . GENERALITIES. ► Objective. ► Nervous system excited, [20] . ► Lassitude, weariness, [10] . [280.] ► Uncommon tiredness and weakness (sixth day), [11] . ► Great weakness of all the limbs, in morning (second day), [7] . ► Continual restlessness and dreams that a lump is in his throat and right ear, [11] . ► Great restlessness and nervousness (second day), [19] . ► Nervousness and irritability for a short time, about noon (second day), [17b] . ► Subjective. ► Heaviness and sleepiness during day (fifth day), [17b] . ► A dull, heavy, and at times a sleepy feeling during day (second day), [11] . ► Sense of languor and depression, as after excessive exhilaration or intoxication; this continued, with intermission, for three days (second day), [18] . ► Felt wearied in body and confused in mind on going to bed (after ten minutes), [9] . ► Feels very tired in morning, after restless sleep with many dreams (third day), [11] . [290.] ► Feeling of depression and weakness of whole system, as after a severe illness (second day), [7] . ► Feeling as if an attack of typhus fever were coming on, [10] . ► Sense of general prostration in morning (second day), [7] . ► General nervous, uneasy sensation (second day), [20] . ► A peculiar nervous thrill pervading the whole frame, even to the fingers and toes, affecting especially the joints (second day), [18] . ► Sensation of having taken cold, [20] . ► A very uncomfortable sensation in the body after eating, as if it were distended and puffed up; sensation across the chest and stomach, as if oppressed, [1] . SKIN. ► Objective. ► Redness of skin, like a chronic eruption, [25] . ► Eruptions, Dry. ► Eruption on posterior cervical region, [20] . ► Eruption on inner and lower part of thigh, with itching (second day), [19] . [300.] ► (Warts here and there on the prepuce, which bleed when touched), [1] . ► Eruptions, Moist. ► A small pimple (like a transparent vesicle), sore to touch, on inner edge of eyelid, near the spot where the pain was, the latter having disappeared (second day), [17] . ► Right middle finger and palm of hand, scurvy tetter exedens, [10] . ► Eruptions, Pustular. ► (The margin of ulcers becomes painful and tense), [2] . ► Sore in inside of under lip towards the left, [11] . ► Subjective. ► From the first, felt as if pimples would come out over his body, with general uneasy sensation and itching; (has had this feeling for some time, but now in an aggravated form), [20] . ► Itching at night, especially on inside of thighs, [20] . ► Itching in various parts of the body while walking in open air, [17b] . ► Itching over the body during the day (second day), [17b] . ► Spot on right side, on one of the ribs (seventh and eighth), as large as a wafer, very sore to touch, with occasionally a sore pain in and around it (fourth day); some pains on left side, but without the sore spot (fifth day), [17b] . [310.] ► Itching of eyelids and of various parts of body (sixth day), [17b] . ► Itching of nose, with bleeding, after blowing it; the blood is very dark; the itching is caused by pimples at right nostril, [10] . ► Itching on left side of face, [10] . ► Itching in palm of right hand, [10] . ► Violent itching on the inside of the thighs, knees, and legs, worse at the knees, especially at night (sixth day), [11] . ► Violent itching and pricking on inner side of knee-joint ever since he began to take the medicine, worse in the night and the morning before getting up, [11] . ► Sticking-itching in the forepart of the throat, forepart of the chest, with swollen cervical glands; red points appear, forming round spots, with hard granular pimples; this eruption burns and itches, especially on scratching; at last the spots became painful, [1] . SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Sleepiness. ► Drowsiness, [25] . ► Great drowsiness and lassitude in warm room (after two hours), [12] . ► Unusual drowsiness in morning, [24] . [320.] ► Unusual drowsiness and heaviness over eyes (after three hours), [24] . ► Felt a drowsy sensation, as though he could sleep readily; went to bed at 12 o'clock (after two hours), [20] . ► Desire to sleep during day, [17] . ► Disposition to sleep during the day, [10] . ► Disposition to fall asleep while listening to the lecture, several times, notwithstanding great effort to keep awake, at 11 A.M. (third day), [8] . ► Great inclination to sleep during day (third day), [17b] . ► Sleeplessness. ► No desire for sleep, but sat up and read until 1.30 A.M.; did not sleep for half an hour after going to bed, [20] . ► Restlessness at night, [17] . ► Restlessness and sleeplessness during night from a constant flow of ideas, changing from one subject to another, [16] . ► Great restlessness at night, continual dreaming and waking, [11] . [330.] ► Restless and tossing about during the whole night, with anxious dreams, which he is wholly unable to recall after awaking (second day), [7] . ► Restless, uneasy sleep; increased restlessness on following night, with constant dreaming; seemed to dream before getting to sleep, [19] . ► Sleep restless, with vivid dreams, but he cannot remember them in morning, [15] . ► Still had drowsy sensation on going to bed, and very strong desire to sleep, but could not sleep on account of a disagreeable nervous sensation, which cause him to toss about in bed for an hour and a half, [20] . ► After retiring, did not sleep for over an hour, but tossed about, very nervous and mentally vexed, [20] . ► Wakes up suddenly, as from a dream, [25] . ► Waking suddenly after midnight, as from a dream, he has no breath, like a nightmare, [1] . ► Awoke and started up several times without purpose, [9] . ► Loss of sleep during forepart of night (second day), [7] . ► Loss of sleep at night, without pains and without exhaustion; in the morning he feels strengthened, and as if he had no need of sleep, [1] . [340.] ► Nightly sleeplessness; hears the clock strike every hours, [25] . ► Sensation as if he had not had a refreshing sleep, at 8 A.M., on waking (second day), [20] . ► Dreams. ► Dreamed continually, [20] . ► He would be scarcely lost in a drowse before he would be dreaming, [11] . ► Dreams, with much talking in sleep, which is very restless, [10] . ► Had several dreams, and woke several times during night, [11] . ► Many dreams, and waked up often, [11] . ► Vivid dreams of studies and business, etc., [11] . ► Vivid dreams of the lectures, particularly the anatomical, during the night; could not believe that he was not actually there (third day), [11] . ► Slept not so well as the night before, and his dreams are vivid and rather pleasing, but he cannot bring them to his recollection; (he dreams more or less every night, but thinks the above dreams were rather unusually vivid), [20] . [350.] ► Unusually vivid dreams of a sensual nature, [24] . ► Slept very well, but had very vivid dreams, which he could not remember, [20] . ► Although accustomed to dream much, yet he had more troublesome dreams than usual, [9] . ► In one of his dreams, saw a spider as large as an ox, [9] . FEVER. ► Chilliness. ► Chilliness in warm room, [8] . ► Feeling of coldness and sensation of inertia, [25] . ► Sensation as if a cold breeze was blowing upon the eyes, very marked, in afternoon, when sitting in house (second day), [18] . ► A space about the size of a quarter-dollar, just above and between the supraorbital regions (root of nose?), felt as though pressed upon by a cold metallic body, while within the cranium underneath there seemed to be more warmth than usual (after ten minutes), [9] . ► Coldness in the joints; shivering and drawing in the arms and legs, [1] . ► Hands cold, [15] . ► Heat. [360.] ► Fever, [26] . ► Occasionally, fever and fulness in forehead, [20] . ► From the front to the back of the head, mostly over right eye and temple, heat in the head (second day), [7] . ► Front of head very hot (after half an hour), [8] . ► Heat rises from the stomach into the throat and head, at night, while lying in bed, disappears on sitting up, [1] . ► Flashes of heat, confined to abdomen, with great flatulence, [13] . ► Abdomen, below transverse colon, felt hot (after three hours), [6] . ► Sensation of warmth under sternum (second day), [18] . ► Felt a warm glow through legs, soon succeeded by a dull pain in left arm, just above elbow, and occasional darting pains in lower extremities (after ten minutes), [9] . ► Sweat. ► Perspiration about 12 M., [10] . [370.] ► Skin moist and cool (second day), [7] . ► Sweat between the thighs while walking; it has an offensive odor and is corrosive, [1] . ► Profuse sweating between the thighs, [10] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), On rising, etc. 7 o'clock, giddiness, etc.; after waking, especially when lying in left side and pressing forehead into pillow, pain in forehead; on waking, especially when lying on left side and back, aching pain in forehead; on waking, pain in organ of Conscientiousness ; after rising from bed, fulness, etc.; in occiput, etc.; furred tongue; after rising, drawing in mouth; on waking, at 8 o'clock, throat dry; appetite impaired; on waking, at 8 o'clock, thirsty; hoarseness; aching across small of back, etc.; at 4 o'clock, pain in kidney region; weakness of limbs; sense of prostration; before getting up itching etc., on inner side of thighs. ► ( Forenoon ), All symptoms; head full; at 11 o'clock, feeling in umbilical region; pain in knee-joint. ► ( Noon ), While walking, pain in knee-joint; nervousness, etc.; perspiration. ► ( Afternoon ), From 4 to 5 o'clock, pain from ribs to hypochondriac region; pain in knee-joint; sensation on eyes. ► ( Evening ), All pains; pain in forehead; pain in right frontal region; shooting in temple; soreness of eyes; erections; hoarseness; soreness from ear to neck; pain in side of dorsal vertebræ; at 8 o'clock, numbness, etc., in limbs; sensation in shoulder-joint. ► ( Night ), Dryness, etc., in mouth; itching in anus; on motion in bed, pain in back; itching inside of thighs; itching, etc., on knee-joint; while lying in bed; heat from stomach into throat, etc. ► ( Before midnight ), Loss of sleep. ► ( Open air ), Pain in left hypochondrium. ► ( After dinner ), Feeling in rectum. ► ( After eating ), Noises in ears. ► ( Inspiration ), Soreness under breast. ► ( Long inspiration ), Soreness over heart; pain over back. ► ( Lying down ), Cough. ► ( Motion ), Pain in forehead; sensation across temples; pain in left orbital region. ► ( Pressure ), Pain in head; sore feeling over ossa ilii. ► ( Reading ), Pain in head. ► ( Rest ), Numbness in arm. ► ( Sleeping ), Headache. ► ( Before stool ), Pain in bowels. ► ( Thinking ), Pain in head. ► ( Walking ), Throbbing pulse, etc.; pain in tendo Achillis; sweat between thighs. ► ( In warm room ), Pain in supraorbital region; drowsiness, etc. ► ( Writing ), Pain in arm. ► Amelioration. ► ( Afternoon ), All symptoms. ► ( Evening ), All symptoms. ► ( Open air ), Feels better; mental sensation; fulness, etc., in head. ► ( Walking in open air ), Sense of elevation. ► ( Bending forward ), Pain in left hypochondrium. ► ( External compression of head ), Attacks of headache. ► ( After dinner ), Feels better. ► ( After eating ), Better. ► ( Getting up and washing ), Pain in forehead. ► ( Sitting up ), Cough. ► ( After sleeping ), Better. ► ( Turning to right side of bed ), Pain in forehead. ► ( Walking ), Feeling joints of lower extremities; pain in thighs. ► ( Warmth of stove ), Pain in back; pain in arm. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main

Clinical: Albuminuria; Bubo; Catarrh; Chancre; Cystitis; Dysentery; Eye, inflammation of; Gleet; Gonorrhœa; Gout; Nose, external, sensitive; Priapism; Rheumatism; Sciatica; Scrofula; Sleep, abnormal; Sycosis; Syphilis; Tapeworm; Warts

Hoarseness in the evening. Dyspnœa, with heat. Cough from tickling in the throat. Dry cough, in single shocks, when lying down; > by sitting up. Pain in the l. shoulder, between the clavicle and scapula, interiorly. Pain in the middle of the upper part of r. arm, as though it would break. Periodical shooting pains in the arms. Tearing in the arms when writing, > by the heat of the fire. Sensation of lameness in r. arm. Numbness of l. arm, from elbow to end of little finger, it feels as if the "crazy-bone" was struck. The joints of the fingers and knuckles are red (and hot). Painful jerking in the leg, in the evening, after sleeping. Shooting, drawing, and aching pains in the thighs, from the hip-joints nearly down to the condyles; at night. Violent itching on the inside of thighs, knees, and legs; worse in the knees, esp. at night. Profuse perspiration between the thighs (when walking). Rheumatic pain in r. knee-joint; when walking (ascending), > at rest. Pain in the tendo Achillis and os calcis after walking. Coldness in the joints. Coldness of the feet, day and night. Sensation of lameness in all the limbs. Pulling and shuddering in the arms and the legs. Paralytic pains in the limbs, with indolence and drowsiness. Weariness, languor, tired and prostrated; worse before eating, better when riding in the open air. General nervous, uneasy sensation.

General nervous, uneasy sensation. Great lassitude, prostration, and feeling of lameness in limbs. Weariness, languor, tiredness and prostration ; < before eating, > when riding in open air. Sensation of lameness in all the limbs. Frequent emissions of watery urine. Intermitting : pain of kerato-iritis and uncomplicated iritis. Coming and going gradually : sensation as if right molars and bicuspids were soft, heavy and too large. Lasting about an hour : uneasy creeping and pressive sensation about ossa nasi. Long continued : false labor pains. During whole night : internal and external heat of body. Nightly fever with dry mouth. Periodical : shooting pains in arms. Day and night : coldness of feet. Right : aching in superciliary ridge of eye ; inflammation of eye ; itching, pressing and pricking at inner angle and lower lid ; shooting at canthus of eye, with burning and itching ; scurfy eruption in external ear ; itching in ear ; molars and bicuspids feel soft, heavy and too large ; second upper decayed molar feels as if it would fly to pieces on biting teeth together ; small ulcer on side of tongue ; pain in middle of upper part of arm, as if it would break ; sensation of lameness in arm ; œdema of arm ; rheumatic pain in knee joint ; itching of palm of hand ; red eruption, sometimes with pustules filled with yellow matter, under knee ; nostrils somewhat tumefied. Left : dull pain in temple and side of head ; shooting pain in side of head ; outer half of eye injected and puffy ; severe pains seeming to run around eye ; pain in shoulder, between clavicle and scapula, interiorly ; numbness of arm, from elbow to end of little finger ; itching of side of face. From right to left and from left to right : shooting across abdomen during pregnancy. General nervous, uneasy sensation. As if touched by a cold metallic body on a small space over root of nose ; as of a vise or band around head ; as of congestion in forehead ; as of putting on a heavy pair of spectacles ; as if right molars and bicuspids were soft, heavy and too large ; as if second right upper decayed molar would fly to pieces on biting teeth together ; as if upper abdomen was distended ; as of a large worm in anus ; as if a sore was in urethra when urinating ; as if chest was contracted ; as if muscles of back part of neck were contracted ; as if bruised in small of back ; as if upper part of right arm would break ; as if pimples were coming out over body ; as if crazy-bone was struck. Pain : in forehead and top of head ; from back of head to forehead ; severe, running around left eye ; from inner canthus around eye ; in urethra on urinating ; running over ensiform cartilage from seventh rib on right side diagonally through chest to back ; in back of neck shooting to occiput ; all over back down to loins ; in left shoulder, between clavicle and scapula, interiorly ; in upper part of right arm ; in tendo-achillis and os calcis. Cutting : in forehead. Sudden stitches : on each side of spine, in back and lumbar region. Stitching : above eye, from internal and external canthus, or runs around eye ; may extend into eye, or up into head. Sticking : about punctum lachrymale of upper eyelid. Stinging : in ears, cheeks, temples and sides of head, extending to occiput and nape of neck ; above eye, from internal to external canthus, or runs around eye ; may extend into eye or up into head. Pricking : at inner angle and lower lid of right eye. Shooting : in left side of head ; from occiput forward ; in forehead ; through eye into head ; at inner canthus of right eye ; across abdomen during pregnancy ; in arms ; in thighs, from hip joints nearly down to condyles. Tearing : in forehead ; in bowels ; on each side of spine, in back and lumbar region ; in legs below knees. Rending : in spine. Drawing : in thighs, from hip joints nearly down to condyles. Burning : in inner canthus of right eye ; around anus ; of skin. Soreness : over exit of supraorbital nerve ; along course of supraorbital nerve and corresponding side of head ; in roof of mouth ; of throat ; in stomach. Sharp pains : above eye, from internal to external canthus, or runs around eye ; may extend into eye or up into head. Irritation : of throat. Pressure : over root of nose, zygoma and temples ; in upper abdomen, after eating ; in vagina ; in foot. Pressing : in forehead ; at inner angle and lower lid of right eye. Pressive sensation : about ossa nasi. Oppression : of chest. Pinching : in urethra. Cramps : in bowels. Contracting pain : in throat during empty deglutition. Tensive pains : in ears, cheeks, temples and sides of head, extending to occiput and nape of neck. Labor-like pain : in vagina. Rheumatic pain : in right knee joint. Aching : in superciliary ridge of right eye, extending to back of head ; in small of back ; in thighs, from hip joints nearly down to condyles. Tightness : in temples. Fulness : of head ; in throat, causing constant desire for swallowing. Heaviness : of head. Weight : over root of nose, zygoma and temples. Congested sensation over whole head, principally forehead. Lightness : in head. Dulness : of head. Dull pain : in forehead ; in left temple and side of head. Painful twitching : in leg. Twitching : in penis. Tickling : in throat. Formication : in anus. Creeping : about ossa nasi. Numbness : of left arm, from elbow to end of little finger ; in foot. Weakness : in eyes. Lameness : of thighs ; in right arm ; in arms and legs ; in all limbs. Uneasiness : about ossa nasi. Painful itching : of prepuce. Violent itching : of corona glandis ; on inside of thighs, knees and legs ; < on knees. Itching : of eyelids, outer canthi ; ears, face (l. side), palm of right hand ; inside of thighs ; on knees, legs and shoulders ; of skin ; occasionally, in eruption under right knee ; at inner angle and lower lid of right eye ; in inner canthus of right eye ; in right ear ; of nose ; around anus. Dryness : in mouth and throat. Coldness : of forehead ; in joints of feet. Syphilis ; gonorrhœa and sycotic excrescences. Wandering gout. TOUCH. PASSIVE MOTION. INJURIES. [45] [Cinnb.]. Touch : bones of skull, scalp and even hair painfully sensitive to ; causes bleeding of warts on prepuce, frenum and inner surface. Pressure : > intense headache. Scratching : < burning and itching of skin. On biting teeth together : second right upper decayed molar feels as if it would fly to pieces. Riding in open air : > weariness, languor, tiredness and prostration. Combination of scrofula with syphilis or sycosis, or syphilis and tuberculosis. Syphilis complicated by scrofula, or previous mercurial treatment. Arthritic patient addicted to spirituous liquors ; prosopalgia, parotitis and vesical catarrh. Girl, suffering from dysmenorrhœa ; tapeworm. Man, æt. 28, sanguine temperament, scrofulous ; secondary syphilis. Man, æt. 29, syphilitic phimosis.

head.text: Congestion to head; face purple red

Violent and frightful attack of cephalalgia, in the sinciput and in the temples, mitigated by compression of the head. Stupefying buzzing in the head, a little after dinner, and in the evening before lying down. Giddiness in the morning after rising, when stooping, with nausea. Congestion of blood to the head, particularly to the vertex; worse after eating. Intense headache; he cannot raise his head from the pillow; relieved by external pressure. Dull pain in the forehead, which is cold; relieved by heat. In the morning, after waking, pain in the forehead and top of the head; when lying on the l. side and back; > and going off, when turning on r. side, and after rising. Shooting pain in the l. side of the head, with increase of saliva and great flow of urine. Shooting in the teguments of the head. Painful sensitiveness of the cranium and of the hair on being touched.

Dulness and heaviness of head, with ringing in ears after dinner and late in evening. Fulness in head ; eyes are reddened. Congested sensation over whole head, principally forehead. Congestion of blood to head, particularly to vertex ; < after eating. Sensation as if touched by a cold metallic body, on a small space over root of nose. Feeling like a vise or band around head, cutting, shooting pain in forehead, aching in superciliary ridge of right eye, extending to back of head, with nausea. Pressing in forehead with sensation of congestion. Dull pain in forehead, which is cold ; > by heat. Tearing pain in forehead, before catamenia. In morning, after waking, pain in forehead and top of head ; < when lying on left side and back ; > and going off when turning on right side, and after rising. Dull pain in left temple and side of head. Shooting pain in left side of head, with increase of saliva and great flow of urine. Pain from back of head to forehead with vertigo, cannot grasp ideas ; shooting from occiput forward. Intense headache ; cannot raise his head from pillow ; > by external pressure. Headache with nosebleed. The bones of skull, the scalp, and even the hair are painfully sensitive to touch. Tensive, stinging pains in ears, cheeks, temples and sides of head, extending to occiput and nape of neck, with swelling of parotids and face. θ Catarrh of bladder.

eyes.text: Pains from lachrymal duct around eye to temple, from inner canthus across brows to ear. Severe shooting pain in bones of orbit, especially running from inner to outer canthus in the bone. Redness of whole eye. Lids granulated; canthi and lids red

Inflammation of the eyes, with pressive shootings and constant lachrymation when fixing them on an object. Shooting pains in inner canthus of r. eye, with burning and itching. Inflammation of r. eye, with profuse discharge of mucus from the nose. Flow of tears. Sticking pain about the punctum lachrymale of the upper eyelid. Redness of the whole eye, with swelling of the face.

Dimness and opacity of cornea. Marked photophobia and lachrymation, with redness. Redness of whole eye, with swelling of face. Shooting pains through eye into head. Sharp, stitching, stinging, or dull, aching pain above eye, extending from internal to external canthus, or runs around eye ; pain may extend into eye or up into head. Inflammation of right eye ; itching, pressing and pricking at inner angle and lower lid ; constant lachrymation on looking steadily, with profuse discharge of mucus from nose. Shooting pains in inner canthus of right eye, with burning and itching. Outer half of left eye injected and puffy ; pains severe, seeming to run around the eye, < at night. Sticking pain about punctum lachrymale of upper eyelid. Lids so heavy that they are kept open with difficulty, < in evening. Asthenopia, with pain extending from inner canthus around eye, with soreness over exit of supraorbital nerve, < in morning. Conjunctivitis and blepharitis, discharge < in morning. Kerato-iritis and uncomplicated iritis, especially in syphilitic variety, and if condylomata are present on iris, or on lids ; < at night ; pain intermitting. Keratitis. Soreness along course of supraorbital nerve and corresponding side of head, < at night. Ciliary neuralgia.

nose.text: Pressive sensation, as from heavy spectacles. Pain about root, extending into bones on each side (Aur; Kal hyd)

Violent fluent coryza, with secretion of burning serum. Sensation as if touched by a cold metallic body, on a small space over the root of the nose. Itching of the nose, with bleeding (very dark blood) after blowing it. Coryza, with lameness of the thighs and aching in the small of the back; lumps of dirty yellow mucus are discharged from the posterior nares.

Sensation on bridge of nose similar to that produced by touching it with a metallic substance. Uneasy creeping and pressive sensation about ossa nasi, lasting about an hour ; the sensation experienced by most persons on putting on a pair of heavy spectacles, if not accustomed to wear them. Sensation of weight and pressure at root of nose, zygoma and temples. θ Catarrh. Itching of nose, with bleeding (very dark blood) after blowing it. Coryza, with lameness of thighs and aching pain in small of back ; lumps of dirty yellow mucus are discharged from posterior nares.

mouth_throat.text: Stringy mucus passed through posterior nares into throat. Dryness of mouth and throat; must rinse the mouth. Fiery-looking ulcers in mouth and throat

Both corners of the mouth are chapped. Tongue coated white in the morning. A small ulcer on the roof of the mouth, on the r. side of the tip of the tongue; on the tip of the tongue. Burning, constrictive sensation in the palate; taste bitter in the morning. Salivation and increased flow of urine. Putrid taste in the mouth. Dryness and irritation of the throat (posterior nares, tonsils, fauces) at night, with soreness during the day. In the morning, secretion of tenacious mucus from posterior nares, in lumps. Increased dryness of mouth and throat, being obliged to moisten and rinse the mouth every time he wakes.

Right molars and bicuspids (some decayed) feel soft, heavy, and too large, at 8 P. M. and at 2 or 3 A. M. ; sensation comes and goes gradually. On biting teeth together, second right upper decayed molar feels as if it would fly to pieces. Taste : metallic ; bitter (in morning), putrid. Tongue coated white in morning. Soreness in roof of mouth. A small ulcer on roof of mouth, on right side of tip of tongue. Salivation ; increased flow of saliva and of urine. θ Inflammatory affections of mouth and fauces. Inflammation with great dryness in mouth and throat, < at night, which causes him to drink often. Dryness and irritation of throat at night, with soreness in morning, secretion of tenacious mucus during day, inclination to empty deglutition. Scanty, tenacious, pasty saliva in mouth, without thirst ; > after drinking. Inflammation, with great dryness of throat and mouth ; < at night. Contracting pain in throat during empty deglutition. Fulness in throat causing a constant desire for swallowing. Dryness and irritation of throat (posterior nares, tonsils, fauces) at night, with soreness during day ; in morning, secretion of tenacious mucus, in lumps, from posterior nares. Increased dryness of throat and mouth, being obliged to moisten and rinse mouth every time he wakes.

male.text: Prepuce swollen; warts on it which bleed easily; testicles enlarged; buboes; angry-looking chancres. Syphilides, squamous and vesicular

Swelling of the penis. Pseudo gonorrhœa, with redness and swelling of the prepuce. Violent itching of the corona glandis, with profuse secretion of pus. Small, shining red points on the glans penis. Condyloma. Blennorrhœa. Sycotic excrescences. Sexual desire strongly excited, and great inclination for coition, with great appetite for eating and drinking. Strong erections in the evening in bed. Fetid and corrosive sweats, between the scrotum and the thighs when walking.

Increased sexual desire with violent erections, particularly in evening. Swelling of penis and twitching in it. Great redness of urethra with pinching pain. Pain in urethra on urination. Violent itching of corona glandis, with profuse secretion of pus. Small, shining red points on glans penis. A lentil-sized swelling surrounded by a reddish-yellow circle, on glans penis, near urinary meatus ; several reddish-yellow lentil-shaped discolorations on glans and prepuce. Redness and swelling of prepuce with painful itching. Warts on prepuce, frenum and inner surface, bleeding when touched. Phimosis, with profuse, fetid, dirty, pus-like discharge. θ Secondary syphilis. Syphilitic phimosis, prepuce terribly swollen, purplish and ulcerated, with fetid, gangrenous odor. Red, swollen chancres with hard, elevated edges, not sensitive, discharging thin pus. Indurated or neglected chancres. Indurated chancre on middle of penis. Round chancre above corona glandis as large as a pea, surrounded by a red circle ; three red patches on glans penis and prepuce, resembling in color the eruptions of scarlatina. Gonorrhœa of very long standing, with much pain and soreness during urination ; yellowish-green discharge. Gonorrhœa on a sycotic basis, or complicated with syphilis. Blennorhea of glans penis. Sycotic excrescences. Indurated testicles.

female.text: Leucorrhœa. Feeling of pressure in vagina
Leucorrhœa, causing, during its discharge, a; pressure in the vagina.

A few days before appearance of menses, and during their continuance, tearing pain in forehead, sensation of weakness in eyes, rending in spine, tearing pains and cramps in bowels, with diarrhœa and great prostration. Leucorrhœa, the discharge of which causes a pressure or labor-like pain in vagina. PREGNANCY. PARTURITION. LACTATION. [24] [Cinnb.]. Shooting across abdomen, either right to left or left to right, during pregnancy. Long-continued false labor pains, child's head pressed against symphysis pubis with violent tenesmus in anus.

extremities.text: Pain in forearm from elbow down, including hands. Pain in long bones when barometer lowers; coldness of joints

Pain in left shoulder, between clavicle and scapula, interiorly. Periodical shooting pains in arms. Pain in upper part of right arm, as if it would break. Sensation of lameness in right arm. Numbness of left arm, from elbow to end of little finger. Sensation as if "cazy-bone" had been struck. Joints of fingers and knuckles are red and hot. Œdema of right arm. Shooting, drawing and aching pains in thighs, from hip joints nearly down to condyles ; < at night. θ Ischias rheumatica and syphilitica. Lameness of thighs with coryza. Violent itching on inside of thighs, knees and legs ; < on knees, especially at night. Profuse, offensive sweat between thighs (when walking). Painful twitching in leg, awakens from sleep at night. Rheumatic pain in right knee joint ; < when walking (ascending), > at rest. Tearing pain in legs below knees. Coldness in joints. Nodes on shin bones. Pain in tendo-achillis and os calcis after walking. Pressure and feeling of numbness in foot. Coldness of feet, day and night. Chilliness and lameness in arms and legs. Wandering gout.

skin.text: Very fiery-red looking ulcers. Nodes on shin-bones. Buboes. Condyloma, easily bleeding

Itching: of the nose (bleeding after blowing it); of eyelids; canthi (outer); ears; face (l. side) palms of hands (r.); thighs (inside); knees; legs; at the anus (at night), on the shoulders (evening). Sensation as if pimples were coming out over the body. Red papulous eruption, without itching, on both elbows. Redness of the skin. Red, fiery-looking ulcers, which may occur in the throat or in any other part of the body, in the mouth, on the legs; particularly if there be nodes on the shin-bones. Very angry-looking chancres.

Itching of nose (bleeding after blowing it), of eyelids, canthi (outer), ears, face (l. side), palm of hand (right), thighs (inside), knees, legs, at anus (at night), on shoulders (evening). Burning and itching of skin, < after scratching. Redness of skin ; red spots on skin. Sensation as if pimples were coming out over body. Eruption of red points, spots and pustules. Red, papulous eruption, without itching, on both elbows. Red eruption on finger, sometimes with pustules filled with yellow matter ; the same under right knee, with occasional itching. Chronic impetigo, pustules and scabs on upper lip, immediately under nose ; right nostril also somewhat tumefied. Gangrenous ulcerations ; fiery, angry-looking ulcers. θ Sycosis. Honeycombed ulcers ; fistulous. Elevated ulcers, which have the appearance as if condylomata would grow out of them.

worse_from.text: lying on right side (feels as if contents of body were being dragged over to that side)

_raw: Antidoted by: Hepar, Nit. ac., Opium, and Sulphur. Compare: Camph. (red spots); Lach., Merc., Nit. ac., Thuja (Cinnab. is better than Thuja in warts on prepuce); compare also Sep. (warts on margin of prepuce); Ant. t. (warts at back of glans). Seneg. has > bending head backward, Clem. has headache from same; Clem. also has vertigo on lifting head up or moving head; Cinnab. has pain in back of neck when head is thrown back.
Antidoted by Cinchon., Hepar, Nitr. ac., Opium, Sulphur
Compare : Camphor (red spots) ; Laches. ; Mercur. ; Nitr. ac. and Thuya

keynotes.text: color="#800000">CINNABARIS Mercuric Sulphide (MERCURIUS SULPHURATUS RUBER) For certain forms of ciliary neuralgia and ulceration upon a syphilitic base, this remedy is most effective. Sleepless during night.

Cinnabar. corresponds to sycosis as well as to syphilis, and to combinations of the two. In warts on the prepuce it is more specific than Thuja; especially for fan-shaped warts. In the mental sphere there is indolence and indisposition to mental labour. Forgetful. Fretful, easily provoked. Headache with nosebleed. General sensitiveness to touch: bones of skull, scalp, roots of hair; bridge of nose; warts bleed when touched. Sensation on bridge of nose as if touched with metallic substance, uneasy creeping and pressing sensation about nasal bones as from wearing spectacles when not used to them. Jerkings and pullings are frequent. Berridge reports this symptom cured: "Left leg feels shorter than right whilst walking." jerking in penis; occurring during sleep. Tearing stitches in glans. Burning, stinging, itching of corona glandis. Leucorrhœa, the discharge of which causes a pressure in vagina. Hæmorrhages are frequent: nose-bleed; bleeding piles. In addition to dysenteric symptoms there is obstinate constipation, stools hard and too large. Protrusion of anus during stool. Formication as from a large worm. Little pimples round anus with burning and itching. The skin is much affected. Redness predominates (colour of the drug). Red spots. Heat, redness, and swelling of face, especially about eyes. "We are led to use this for very red and very fiery-looking ulcers, which may occur in the throat or on any other part of the body, in the mouth, on the legs; particularly if there be nodes on the shin-bones. In very angry-looking chancres" (Guernsey). Eruption on posterior cervical region; on inner and lower part of thigh with itching. Warts; pimples; pustules; ulcers; violent itching and pricking, especially about joints. The back of the neck is much affected. Pain extending to occiput when head is thrown back. Pain r. side of neck on turning head. Muscles seem contracted. Glands enlarged. The symptoms are > in open air. Cold and chilly in warm room. In summer. Most symptoms are at night. Sweat at noon. Generally rest >; walking . Headache after sleep. After dinner >. Symptoms intermit in severity.

KEY-NOTES TO THE MATERIA MEDICA by HENRY N. GUERNSEY, M.D. Presented by Médi-T CINNABARIS We are led to use this for very red, and very fiery looking ulcers, which may occur in the throat or in any other part of the body, in the mouth, on the legs; particularly if there be nodes on the shinbones. For very angry looking chancres. Copyright © Médi-T 2000
Main LECTURES ON HOMŒOPATHIC MATERIA MEDICA by JAMES TYLER KENT, A.M., M.D. Late Professor of Materia Medica in Hering College, Chicago. Presented by Dr Robert Séror
Cinnabaris (Red Sulphide of Mercury.)
The symptoms are worse at night from warmth of the bed, and when perspiring, like Mercurius. Worse from both heat and cold,

Catarrhal inflammation. Fig warts (Thuja). Ulcers. Many complaints from eating. Syphilis in all stages. Suppurating glands; chancres. It is best to study this remedy as a form of Mercurius, which has a few cunning phases of its own. It is a deep acting remedy in sycosis
The patient desires to be alone. Aversion to mental work. Forgets things which he intended to do. Mind crowded with thoughts preventing sleep.

The pains in the head are violent; worse after eating; better by heat and pressure. Fullness in the whole head. Constriction. Pain in the cold forehead, which is ameliorated by heat. Tearing in the forehead before the menstrual flow. Pain in the forehead and vertex in the morning, worse lying on the left side and back, ameliorated lying on the right side, and it passes off after rising.
Shooting pains in the left side of the head with flow of saliva and copious urine. Headache with nosebleed. Sensitive scalp and skull. Supra-orbital neuralgia.

Stitching, and dull pains in the eyes. Inflammation of the conjunctiva; worse at night. Red, congested lids. Ptosis. Weak vision. Iritis of syphilitic origin. The symptoms are worse at night. Sharp paroxysmal pains from the warmth of the bed.
Roaring in the ears after eating. Itching in the ears.
Cold spot on root of nose Pressure on the bones of the nose. Coryza with dirty yellow -mucus drawn from posterior nares. Epistaxis; pains in back and limbs.
The symptoms of the teeth are similar to Mercurius.

Tongue coated white every morning. Taste putrid, metallic and bitter. Sore ulcerated mouth. Salivation. Inflammation of mouth and throat with great thirst, worse at night. Dry mouth, and viscid mucus in the throat. Fullness in the throat, with constant desire to swallow. Dryness of the throat.
Aversion to food. Eructations, and vomiting. Tenderness of the stomach.
Syphilitic buboes.
Dysentery, worse every night; bloody mucous stools; much straining. Diarrhoea, with greenish stools, worse at night. Protrusion of anus during stool.
Copious urine. Pain as from an ulcer in urethra when urinating; it wakes him also at night. Albumin in the urine.

Inflammation of glans penis with profuse secretion of pus. Increased sexual desire. Swelling of prepuce with much itching. Warts on the prepuce and fraenum, bleeding when touched. Chancres on the prepuce of gangrenous odor. Inflamed and swollen chancres, hard, discharging pus. Indurated, or neglected chancres.

Gonorrhoea, of yellowish green discharge, much pain during flow of urine. Symptoms worse at night, and from the warmth of the bed. The patient is sensitive to both a warm room, and to cold air. Induration of testes.
Syphilitic laryngeal ulcers in a tubercular patient. Hoarseness in the evening.
Pulse fast in the evening and night.
Stiff neck with pains shooting to occiput. Stitching pains each side of spine in dorsal and lumbar regions, worse on deep breathing.
Pain in the limbs at night. Sensitive to sudden changes in the weather. Lame, bruised and stiff in all the limbs. Pains worse from motion. Syphilitic nodes on tibia.
Pain in tendo Achillis and os calcis after walking. Numbness in the feet. Cold feet, day and night. Wandering gout.
Burning itching of the skin, worse scratching. Itching all over. Redness, and red spots on the skin. Pustules. Gangrenous ulcers. Elevated ulcers.
It is antidoted by Hepar and Nitric acid. It is closely related to Thuja.
Copyright © Robert Séror 2000 Mise en page Copyright © Sylvain Cazalet 2000

LECTURES ON HOMOPATHIC MATERIA MEDICA by JAMES TYLER KENT, A.M., M.D. Late Professor of Materia Medica in Hering College, Chicago. Presented by Dr Robert Séror Cinnabaris (Red Sulphide of Mercury.) It is a deep acting remedy in sycosis The patient desires to be alone. Aversion to mental work. Forgets things which he intended to do. Mind crowded with thoughts preventing sleep. Tearing in the forehead before the menstrual flow. Pain in the forehead and vertex in the morning, worse lying on the left side and back, ameliorated lying on the right side, and it passes off after rising. Shooting pains in the left side of the head with flow of saliva and copious urine. Headache with nosebleed. Sensitive scalp and skull. Supra-orbital neuralgia. Stitching, and dull pains in the eyes. Inflammation of the conjunctiva; worse at night. Red, congested lids. Ptosis. Weak vision. Iritis of syphilitic origin. The symptoms are worse at night. Sharp paroxysmal pains from the warmth of the bed. Roaring in the ears after eating. Itching in the ears. Cold spot on root of nose Pressure on the bones of the nose. Coryza with dirty yellow -mucus drawn from posterior nares. Epistaxis; pains in back and limbs. The symptoms of the teeth are similar to Mercurius . Tongue coated white every morning. Taste putrid, metallic and bitter. Sore ulcerated mouth. Salivation. Inflammation of mouth and throat with great thirst, worse at night. Dry mouth, and viscid mucus in the throat. Fullness in the throat, with constant desire to swallow. Dryness of the throat. Aversion to food. Eructations, and vomiting. Tenderness of the stomach. Syphilitic buboes. Dysentery, worse every night; bloody mucous stools; much straining. Diarrhoea, with greenish stools, worse at night. Protrusion of anus during stool. Copious urine. Pain as from an ulcer in urethra when urinating; it wakes him also at night. Albumin in the urine. Inflammation of glans penis with profuse secretion of pus. Increased sexual desire. Swelling of prepuce with much itching. Warts on the prepuce and fraenum, bleeding when touched. Chancres on the prepuce of gangrenous odor. Inflamed and swollen chancres, hard, discharging pus. Indurated, or neglected chancres. Gonorrhoea, of yellowish green discharge, much pain during flow of urine. Symptoms worse at night, and from the warmth of the bed. The patient is sensitive to both a warm room, and to cold air. Induration of testes. Syphilitic laryngeal ulcers in a tubercular patient. Hoarseness in the evening. Pulse fast in the evening and night. Stiff neck with pains shooting to occiput. Stitching pains each side of spine in dorsal and lumbar regions, worse on deep breathing. Pain in the limbs at night. Sensitive to sudden changes in the weather. Lame, bruised and stiff in all the limbs. Pains worse from motion. Syphilitic nodes on tibia. Pain in tendo Achillis and os calcis after walking. Text Book of Materia Medica. By Adolph Lippe, M. D. Professor of Materia Medica at the Homopathic College of Pennsylvania. Presented by Médi-T. Cinnabaris. Mind and Disposition. Indisposition for mental labor. Sensation of fulness of the head from mental application. Forgetfulness (forgets things he has to do). Fretful, easily provoked. [5] Desire to be alone. Head. Giddiness in the morning after rising, when stooping, with nausea. Fulness in the head ; the eyes are reddened. Congested sensation over the whole head, principally the forehead. Congestion of blood to the head, particularly to the vertex ; worse after eating. [10] Intense headache ; he cannot raise his head from the pillow ; relieved by external pressure. Dull pain in the forehead, which is cold ; relieved by heat. Sensation as if touched by a cold metallic body, on a small space over the root of the nose. In the morning, after waking, pain in the forehead and top of the head ; worse when lying on the left side and back ; better and going off, when turning on the right side, and after rising. Shooting pain in the left side of the head, with increase of saliva and great flow of urine. [15] Sensitiveness of the head to the touch -even the hairs are sore. Eyes. Shooting pains in the inner canthus of the right eye, with burning and itching. Inflammation of the right eye ; itching, pressing and pricking at the inner angle and lower lid ; constant lachrymation on looking steadily, with profuse discharge of mucus from the nose. Flow of tears. Sticking pain about the punctum lachrymale of the upper eyelid. [20] Redness of the whole eye, with swelling of the face. Ears. Roaring in the ears, with swelling of the face (after eating). Scurfy eruption in the right external ear. Itching in the right ear. Nose. Itching of the nose, with bleeding (very dark blood) after blowing it. [25] Coryza, with lameness of the thighs and aching pain in the small of the back ; lumps of dirty yellow mucus are discharged from the posterior nares. Face. Heat of the face, which is much swollen, mostly about the eyes. Mouth and Throat. Both corners of the mouth are chapped. Tongue coated white in the morning. A small ulcer on the roof of the mouth, on the right side of the tip of the tongue ; on the tip of the tongue. [30] Soreness in the roof of the mouth. Dryness in the mouth and throat at night, which causes him to drink often. Inflammation, with great dryness of the throat and mouth ; worse at night. Dryness and irritation of the throat (posterior nares, tonsils, fauces) at night, with soreness during the day ; in the morning, secretion of tenacious mucus also, in lumps, from the posterior nares. Contracting pain in the throat during empty deglutition. [35] Fulness in the throat, causing a constant desire for swallowing. Taste bitter (in the morning). Increased flow of saliva (and of urine). Salivation. Scanty, tenacious, frothy saliva in the mouth, without thirst ; better after drinking. [40] Dryness and putrid taste in the mouth. Stomach and Abdomen. Appetite increased. Soreness in the stomach with dizziness and lightness in the head and tightness in the temples. Nausea, alleviated by eructations. Nausea, with water-brash (in the evening). [45] Flashes of heat confined to the abdomen, with great flatulence (worse in the forenoon). Stool and Anus. Soft, scanty stools twice a day, preceded by pinching ; less afterwards. Bloody dysentery. Sensation of formication in the anus, as if from a large worm. Little pimples around the anus, with burning and itching ; thin stools and tenesmus. Urinary Organs. [50] Frequent and increased emission of watery urine ; also daring the night. Pain, as if from a sore in the urethra when urinating ; this pain wakes him up at night. Genital Organs. Men . Swelling of the penis. Redness and swelling of the prepuce, with painful itching. Violent itching of the corona glandis, with profuse secretion of pus. [55] Small, shining red points on the glans penis. Blennorrha of the glans penis. Sycotic excrescences. Violent erections in the evening. Women . Leucorrha, causing, during its discharge, a pressing in the vagina. Respiratory Organs. [60] Hoarseness in the evening. Chest oppressed, feels contracted ; relieved by stretching himself. Dyspna, with heat. Pain running over the ensiform cartilage, from the seventh rib on the right side diagonally through the chest. Cough from tickling in the throat. Back. [65] The muscles of the back part of the neck seem as if contracted. Aching in the small of the back, as if bruised. Pain all over the back down to the loins, aggravated on drawing a long breath. Extremities. Upper . Pain in the left shoulder, between the clavicle and, scapula ; interiorly. Pain in the middle of the upper part of the right arm, as though it would break. [70] Periodical shooting pains in the arms. Sensation of lameness in the right arm. Numbness of the left arm, from the elbow to the end of the little finger. It feels as if the "crazy-bone" was struck. The joints of the fingers and knuckles are red (and hot). [75] Lower . Shooting, drawing and aching pains in the thighs, from the hip-joints nearly down to the condyles ; worse at night. Violent itching on the inside of the thighs, knees and legs ; worse on the knees, especially at night. Profuse perspiration between the thighs (when walking). Rheumatic pain in the right knee-joint ; worse when walking (ascending), better at rest. Pain in the tendo Achilles and os calcis after walking. [80] Coldness in the joints. Coldness of the feet, day and night. Generalities. Sensation of lameness in all the limbs. Weariness, languor, tired and prostrated worse before eating, better when riding in the open air. General nervous, uneasy sensation. Sleep. [85] Sleepiness in the day-time and sleeplessness at night ; unconquerable desire to sleep after dinner, early in the evening (during the day). Restlessness and sleeplessness at night, from a constant flow of ideas changing from one thing to another. Restless sleep, with vivid dreams and much talking. Fever. Pulse slower in the forepart of the day, accelerated in the evening. Coldness and chilliness in the warm room. [90] Internal and external heat of the body during the whole night. Profuse perspiration between the thighs. Perspiration most at noon. Skin. Itching of the nose (bleeding after blowing it), of the eye-lids, canthi (outer), ears, face (left side), palms of the hands (right), thighs (inside), knees, legs, at the anus (at night), on the shoulders (evening). Sensation as if pimples were coming out over the body. [95] Red papulous eruption, without itching, on both elbows. Redness of the skin. Conditions. The pains intermit in severity. Aggravations in the evening and at night, except of the perspiration, which is worse at midday ; after sleeping (headache). Amelioration in the open air, and after dinner. Copyright © Médi-T 2006

mental_emotional.text: Indisposition for mental labour. Sensation of fulness in the head from mental application. Forgetfulness (forgets things he has to do). Fretful, easily provoked. Desire to be alone.

Indisposition for mental labor. Sensation of fulness of head from mental application. Forgetfulness (forgets things he has to do.). Fretful, easily provoked, irritable. Desire to be alone. Mind clear and cheerful. Exhilaration. Dizziness : in morning after rising ; when stooping ; with nausea.

ears.text: Roaring in the ears with swelling of the face (after eating). Scurfy eruption in r. external ear. Itching in r. ear.
Roaring in ears, with swelling of face (after eating). Scurfy eruption in right external ear. Itching in right ear.

face.text: Heat of the face, which is much swollen, mostly about the eyes.
Hot face, which is much swollen, mostly about eyes. Corners of mouth chapped.

stomach_abdomen.text: Nocturnal dryness and heat in the mouth and in the throat, with much thirst. Scanty, tenacious, frothy saliva in the mouth, without thirst; better after drinking. Pressive contractions in the throat during deglutition. After a meal, disagreeable sensation of swelling over the whole body, with tightness in the chest and in the stomach. Appetite increased. At night, heat, which extends upwards from the stomach towards the neck and the head, and disperses on rising up in bed. Soreness in the stomach, with dizziness and lightness in the head and tightness in the temples. Nausea, alleviated by eructations. Nausea, with water-brash (in the evening). Flashes of heat confined to the abdomen, with great flatulence (worse in the forenoon).

APPETITE, THIRST. DESIRES, AVERSIONS. [14] [Cinnb.]. Want of appetite with aversion to food. After eating, great discomfort and feeling of distension and pressure in upper abdomen, with flushes of heat. Nausea : with waterbrash ; alleviated by eructations and vomiting. Soreness in stomach, with dizziness and lightness in head, and tightness in temples. Flatulence of stomach ; with irregularity of stools. Griping colic, followed by soft, mushy stools. Tapeworm. Syphilitic buboes, indurated, not very sensitive or inflamed ; surrounding glands also swollen.

stool_rectum.text: Evacuations, soft and frequent, preceded by pinchings in the abdomen; less afterwards. Bloody dysentery. Greenish mucous diarrhœa. Sensation of formication in the anus, as if from a large worm. Little pimples around the anus, with burning and itching; thin stools and tenesmus.

Irregularity of passages. Bloody dysentery. Green, mucous diarrhœa which stains the skin about the anus and scrotum a copper color. Thin stools with tenesmus. Nightly painful diarrhœa. Sensation of formication in anus, as if from a large worm. Little pimples around anus, with burning and itching. Protrusion of anus during stool.

urinary.text: Frequent and increasing emission of watery urine; also during the night. Pain, as if from a sore in the urethra, when urinating; this pain wakes him up at night.
Frequent and increased emission of watery urine ; also during night. Pain, as if from a sore in urethra when urinating ; this pain wakes him up at night. Albuminuria.

chest_heart.text: Chest oppressed, feels contracted; relieved by stretching himself. Pain running over the ensiform cartilage, from the seventh rib on the r. side diagonally through the chest. Pulsative and shooting pains in the chest, esp. when walking.

Dyspnœa with heat. Chest oppressed, feels contracted ; > by stretching himself. Oppression of chest awakens after midnight. Pain running over ensiform cartilage from seventh rib on r. side diagonally through chest to back. Pulse slower in forepart of day, accelerated in evening. Red spots and points on neck and chest, changing to little blotches.

back.text: Pain in back part of neck when head is thrown back, extending to occiput. Wrenching pains in the vertebræ of the neck. The muscles of the back part of the neck seem as if contracted. Tearing in the side of the back, even at night on moving in the bed, > by the heat of the fire. Aching in the small of the back, as if bruised. Pain all over the back down to the loins, aggravated on drawing a long breath.

The muscles of back part of neck seem as if contracted. Pain in back of neck shooting to occiput, with stiffness and hard swelling of glands at back of neck. Aching in small of back as if bruised, with coryza. Sudden stitches and tearing pains on each side of spine, in back and lumbar region. Pain all over back down to loins, < on drawing a long breath.

sleep.text: Sleepiness in the daytime and sleeplessness at night; unconquerable desire to sleep after dinner, early in the evening (during the day). Restlessness and sleeplessness at night, from a constant flow of ideas changing from one thing to another. Nightly sleeplessness, without causing fatigue. Restless sleep, with vivid dreams and much talking. Nightmare after midnight.

Sleepiness in daytime and sleeplessness at night ; unconquerable desire to sleep after dinner and early in evening. Restlessness and sleeplessness at night, from a constant flow of ideas changing from one thing to another. Wakes suddenly after midnight with oppression of chest. Restless sleep, with vivid dreams and much talking.

fever_chill.text: Pulse slower in the forepart of the day, accelerated in the evening. Coldness and chilliness in the warm room. Internal and external heat of the body during the whole night. Profuse perspiration between the thighs. Perspiration most at noon. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.

Coldness and chilliness in warm room. Internal and external heat of body during whole night. Flushes of heat confined to abdomen, with great flatulence ; < in forenoon. Nightly fever with dry mouth. Perspiration most at noon.

respiratory.text: VOICE AND LARYNX. TRACHEA AND BRONCHIA. [25] [Cinnb.]. Hoarseness in evening. Syphilitic laryngeal ulcers, torpid, and associated with tuberculosis. Cough from tickling in throat.
